welcome_message: Welcome to the World Job Encyclopedia!
no_account_signup: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth_error_generic: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again.
signup_success: Sign up successful. Please log in.
mfa_prompt_code: Please enter your Multi-Factor Authentication code.
game_unlocked_jobs_description: Travel the world and experience various jobs!
game_unlocked_economy_description: Learn about stock trading and market mechanisms!
job_baker_description: Bake delicious bread and sell it in your shop.
location_home_village_desc: A peaceful village, the starting point of your adventure.
location_forest_outpost_desc: A small outpost surrounded by a rich forest.
location_mountain_peak_desc: A mysterious place with rugged mountains.
location_desert_oasis_desc: A spring of life in the middle of a vast desert.
minigame_native_placeholder: Minigames are currently only available on the web version.
minigame_native_placeholder_web_only: Please play on a web browser.
ad_viewer_error_generic: An error occurred while loading the ad.
ad_viewer_disclaimer: Ads displayed are child-appropriate content only, limited to 10 views per day.
parent_dashboard_unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.
chat_error_no_user: You must be logged in to use chat.
chat_no_friends_message: You don't have any friends yet. Make some friends to start chatting!
settings_notifications_enabled_desc: Receive notifications about new events and messages.
settings_notifications_disabled_desc: Notifications are disabled. You might miss important information.
settings_data_deletion_desc: If you delete your account, all personal data will be permanently removed within 30 days. This action cannot be undone.
settings_delete_account_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
settings_delete_account_success: Account deletion request submitted. You will be logged out.
settings_delete_account_error: An error occurred during account deletion.
settings_error_no_user: You must be logged in to view settings.
